reforms.description: Austria adopted a new national climate strategy in 2018, which includes a Digitalisation Strategy aimed at enhancing digital infrastructure and fostering collaboration among stakeholders to achieve greenhouse gas emission targets in line with the Paris Accord, including a goal for 100% renewable electricity generation by 2030.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to enhance digital infrastructure which is expected to support innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The national climate strategy was adopted and is in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in Austria's approach to climate and digitalisation.
reforms.source_quote: In May 2018, the government issued a new Climate and Energy Strategy as required by the EU from all member states.

reforms.description: Austria introduced a comprehensive Start-up Package in 2019, which includes additional risk-finance through a public Digitalization and Growth Fund that co-invests in start-ups alongside private venture-capital funds, new subsidies, regulatory sandboxes, and educational programs to enhance the startup ecosystem and support innovative firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The package aims to enhance access to capital and support for start-ups, which is expected to drive innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Start-up Package was officially launched and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The Start-up Package represents a significant overhaul of support mechanisms for start-ups in Austria.
reforms.source_quote: A Start-up Package was introduced May in 2019, with i) additional risk-finance through a public Digitalization and Growth Fund (which will co-invest in start-ups together with private venture-capital funds) and ii) more credit guarantees.

reforms.description: Austria is enhancing its human capital for innovation by launching new apprenticeship occupational profiles enriched with digital content, support programmes like 'SME Digital' and 'Digital Innovation Hubs', and measures to improve digital skills, including the 'Digital Competence Pact' and modernization of the Red-White-Red card process for international students and high-skilled migrants.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives aim to align education with labor market needs and improve the skill set of the workforce, which is crucial for innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiatives have been announced but not yet fully implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, these reforms are part of a broader strategy and do not represent a complete overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The procedure is intended to be modernized by lowering the statutory salary threshold and by eliminating the proof of accommodation needed.

reforms.description: Austria is considering scaling up existing support programmes for start-ups, including the aws Pre-/Seed programme, to provide additional financing and assistance, including educational measures to facilitate business transfers and address regional skill mismatches.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: While the scaling up of support could enhance access to capital, it may also create dependency on public funding.
reforms.status_evidence: The scaling up of support programmes is under consideration and has not yet been implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The consideration of scaling up existing programmes indicates a significant but not transformative change.
reforms.source_quote: The previous government considered scaling up the existing aws Pre-/Seed programme to provide start-ups with financing, but also with assistance and educative measures.

reforms.description: Austria's 'Broadband Strategy 2030' was adopted to facilitate new entries and stimulate competition in broadband services, aiming for a nationwide 5G network by 2025.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to enhance digital connectivity, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Broadband Strategy was adopted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant initiative but is part of a broader digital infrastructure effort.
reforms.source_quote: A 'Broadband Strategy 2030' was adopted in February 2019.

reforms.description: Austria announced a digital taxation initiative, implementing a 5% tax on online advertising revenues from companies with significant global sales, starting in 2020.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact of the tax on innovation and business operations is ambiguous.
reforms.status_evidence: The digital taxation initiative has been announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is a minor adjustment in tax policy rather than a significant reform.
reforms.source_quote: Austria announced a digital taxation initiative. A 5% tax rate will, beginning in 2020, apply to online advertising revenues from companies generating global sales of EUR 750 million.

reforms.description: Austrian authorities should consider reintroducing an inheritance tax with targeted tax relief for business assets to prevent family-owned businesses from being split up during property transfers.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The potential impact on innovation and business continuity is uncertain.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal for reintroducing an inheritance tax is under consideration.
reforms.importance_rationale: This consideration does not represent a significant policy change.
reforms.source_quote: Austrian authorities could consider reintroducing an inheritance tax.
